title: Glaring Summer Days
overview: It's still only June, but Ousui Academy is stricken by intense heat. To make matters worse, the air conditioner in the student council room is broken. Then Ashe comes up with an idea to combat the heat...

title: Cheerful Cooking
overview: Miyase Restaurant, Mihiro's family business, plans to add some new items to its menu for the summer... so Mihiro decides to ask the other student council members to help come up with ideas.

title: Last-Minute Drawing
overview: As the deadline for her manuscript approaches, Kaoruko is struggling  with the poses of some of the characters, so she  asks Toa and Mihiro to model for her. Toa isn't interested at  first, but when Kaoruko offers her favorite food as compensation...

title: Frantic Hunting
overview: Though Kaoruko has completed her mountain of work, the student council  room is now buried under a mountain of trash.  Kaoruko was enjoying the feeling of having her manuscript  done, but then a small black form scurries in front of her...

title: Scary After-School
overview: Ashe is reading a book of school horror stories and loses track of the time. When she finally gets up to leave, the school is already dark and empty...

title: Puzzlingly Mysterious
overview: Mihiro finds a piece of paper in the student council room with some odd scribbles that might be handwriting. Kaoruko thinks it must be a riddle that Kouki devised for an upcoming story in his manga, and sets about trying to decipher it!

title: Mumbly Sleeping
overview: Kaoruko hasn't slept for about a week in her rush to complete another manuscript, so the other student council girls decide to do whatever they can to help her get some sleep...

title: Heart-Pounding Mechanics
overview: Ashe and Mihiro enter the student council room to find a robot inside! The robot, Axis-kun, was built to help with various tasks, and the school is assisting in its development as a monitor. But as Ashe inspects the newcomer, she gets a bit too excited and the inevitable happens...

title: Kitty Kitty Melancholic
overview: Mihiro finds a lost cat on the way to school and asks Toa to help her find its owner.

title: This-and-That Slapstick
overview: Now that students have the ability to upload videos to the school's website, Kaoruko suggests that the student council try filming a movie to upload.

title: Round-and-Round Swimming
overview: The girls of the student council are visiting a water park... but an unexpected accident takes all the relaxation out of their vacation!

title: Exciting Surprise
overview: The girls must keep Kouki out of the student council  room while they prepare a surprise birthday party for him.
